title: Select Multiple Objects
text: Select Multiple Objects You can select multiple objects in a Resource Browser, Structure Editor, or Properties Inspector using Windows mouse key conventions Ctrl+Click and Shift+Click. To select a consecutive group of objects, click the first item, press and hold down the Shift key, and then click the last item. To select non-consecutive objects, press and hold down the Ctrl key, and then click each item that you want to select. After selecting objects, you can perform many common tasks, such as copying, deleting, or renaming. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
